concerns.text: SC-005 states checklist items must be 'community‑vetted' and 'approved by at least two domain experts (simulated via a review step)'. The criteria for 'community‑vetted' and what constitutes 'approval' are not measurable. Define explicit verification (e.g., 'items must cite at least one published reproducibility guideline' and 'approval recorded as signed review form with reviewer name/date').

FR-003 requires verifying 'the dataset contains all variables required for the model' but does not specify how the system determines what variables are required per paper. Add a verification procedure (e.g., 'variables required are extracted from the paper's methods section and validated against manifest schema').

FR-008 requires 'reporting the variance explained by each factor' but does not specify the output format or what constitutes acceptable reporting. Define the expected output (e.g., 'report as JSON with R² value and per‑factor variance components').

FR-011 states checklist items must be 'derived from the failure‑mode analysis' but does not specify how this derivation is verified. Add traceability requirement (e.g., 'each checklist item must reference at least one documented failure mode from the analysis log').
